examples: The treasure is buried two meters below the surface.
The marmalade is on the shelf below the bread.

definitions.text: Lower than in value, price, rank, concentration, etc.
examples: Liverpool are below Manchester City in the Premier League.
The River Thames is tidal below Teddington Lock.

definitions.text: In or to a lower place.
examples: The town is situated on a hillside, with a river running below.
He was pulled below by a sea monster.

definitions.text: On or to a lower storey.
examples: She lives below, on the ground floor.

definitions.text: On or to a lower deck, especially as relative to the main deck.
examples: The captain went below to inspect the engine.
